description_long: This is a rugged, ankle-high boot with a sturdy construction, featuring a two-tone brown color scheme. The upper part of the boot is made from a darker brown material, while the lower section and toe area are a lighter tan. The boot has a standard criss-cross lacing system with metal eyelets and a thick, robust sole designed for durability and traction. The collar appears padded for comfort, and the interior is lined with a soft, lighter material. The overall design suggests it is suitable for urban environments, providing both protection and style.
description: A sturdy, two-tone brown ankle boot with criss-cross laces and a thick, durable sole. The boot features a padded collar and a comfortable, lined interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, symmetrical lacing, and the padded collar opening.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the two-tone color split, the full length of the laces, and the thick sole.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the circular padded collar and the geometric pattern inside the boot opening.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, showing the color contrast and the boot's overall profile.
